planning_request.user_request: Proceed with the next documented governance step: author a reviewer-qualification acceptance and controlled-apply runbook plus a machine-readable apply-request template for a future completed sailing-domain review submission. The artifacts must preserve fail-closed behavior: no person is selected or contacted, no reviewer is accepted, no registry disposition changes, no release is approved, and no scenario/model/scoring contract can change through this workflow.
planning_request.desired_outcome: Two documentation-only artifacts that make the future accept/reject/apply decision auditable: a runbook with decision matrix and a blank apply-request template that references a submission by path/digest, requires explicit authority approval, checks concrete bindings, distinguishes evidence review from release/P1 gates, and restricts requested registry deltas to the existing allowlist.
known_context: Canonical registry: docs/content/domain-validation-registry.yaml; exactly five assumption records and all model/contract/coordinate/determinism bindings are TBD.
Existing controlled-apply allowlist: reviewer, review_date, disposition, source_or_evidence_gap_reason.
Review submissions do not confer release/P1 approval and needs_evidence is not a registry disposition.
constraints: Documentation/templates only. Do not modify canonical PRD, lesson contracts, registry, review packet/template, dispositions, release state, or code.
Do not identify, recruit, contact, or impersonate a reviewer or authority.
No external research, numerical sailing thresholds, performance values, regulatory claims, or real navigation guidance.
Explicit user/operating authority is required before any future controlled apply; an apply request is not approval.
current_architecture: Documentation-only workspace; no product implementation exists.
previous_review_findings: Any submission with TBD/null version bindings, missing signatures, incomplete coverage, stale digest, or needs_evidence must preserve assumption. Registry application can change only existing allowlisted fields and must be separately authorized.
